title: Information Acquisition Unit
content:
Information Acquisition Unit

Law No. 4982 on Access to Information has established an Access to Information Unit within Üsküdar University in order to evaluate the applications to be made in accordance with the Law No. 4982 on Access to Information. Applications are made to the Access to Information Unit in writing, via e-mail or fax by filling out Annex-1 and Annex-2 forms.

Applications for obtaining information

"Applications must be made by filling in the forms provided below. Applications that are not made in accordance with the form or incompletely filled in will not be accepted".

(annex 1)
